testcase.name: test_post_accepts_valid_hex
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monitor_and_branding_colors.py:106: in test_post_accepts_valid_hex assert data["primary_hover"] == "#0E9E70" E AssertionError: assert '#0D9268' == '#0E9E70' E E - #0E9E70 E + #0D9268

testcase.name: test_post_accepts_lowercase_and_short_and_alpha_hex
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monitor_and_branding_colors.py:118: in test_post_accepts_lowercase_and_short_and_alpha_hex assert r.json()["primary_color"] == "#aabbcc" E AssertionError: assert '#10B981' == '#aabbcc' E E - #aabbcc E + #10B981

testcase.name: test_post_rejects_invalid_hex_with_400

failure.message: AssertionError: value blue should be rejected, got 200 {"logo_data_uri":"data:image/png;base64,","brand_name":"oniptv","tagline":"","primary_color":"#10B981","primary_hover":"#0D9268","primary_soft":"#ECFDF5"} assert 200 == 400 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monitor_and_branding_colors.py:131: in test_post_rejects_invalid_hex_with_400 assert r.status_code == 400, f"value {bad} should be rejected, got {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: value blue should be rejected, got 200 {"logo_data_uri":"data:image/png;base64,","brand_name":"oniptv","tagline":"","primary_color":"#10B981","primary_hover":"#0D9268","primary_soft":"#ECFDF5"} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_partial_update_preserves_other_fields
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monitor_and_branding_colors.py:144: in test_partial_update_preserves_other_fields assert data["primary_color"] == "#333333" E AssertionError: assert '#10B981' == '#333333' E E - #333333 E + #10B981

testcase.name: test_empty_string_clears_field
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monitor_and_branding_colors.py:154: in test_empty_string_clears_field assert r.json()["primary_color"] == "" E AssertionError: assert '#10B981' == '' E E + #10B981

testcase.name: test_cleanup_clears_colors_for_next_run
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monitor_and_branding_colors.py:164: in test_cleanup_clears_colors_for_next_run assert data["primary_color"] == "" E AssertionError: assert '#10B981' == '' E E + #10B981
